scope: compact routed-MoE W2 dgrad fused with SwiGLU backward epilogue

probe.contract: dy_compact [assignments, hidden] x w2 [experts, hidden, intermediate] with SwiGLU backward epilogue -> dgate_compact, dup_compact

promote: the fused W2 dgrad plus SwiGLU-backward epilogue tensor contract
the correctness oracle and S2048 benchmark probe
demote: the simple Triton compact grouped-M implementation for full DSv4 S2048
decision.reason: The fused epilogue is numerically correct, including a random-valued S2048 BF16 check, but the best simple Triton schedule is 8.34 ms on fill-valued S2048 and 9.93 ms on random S2048. That is only about 0.38-0.40x of padded torch W2 dgrad plus SwiGLU, so it cannot improve the retained 33 ms fwd+dgrad lower bound.
decision.next: Use this probe as the oracle for a CK/CK-Tile or TileLang implementation that maps the small per-expert M distribution onto CDNA4 MFMA more directly. The next candidate should keep the same outputs but avoid the simple Triton per-expert, per-M, per-N launch shape that underutilizes the GPU at M around 15-47.
